hero_sub: Original clothing and unique designs created for you. Quality, style and personalization in every garment.
about_p1: We were born for those who seek more than just clothes: we create garments that tell your story. We offer a curated selection of quality clothing and the possibility of designing your own pieces.
about_p2: From casual to formal, sportswear and streetwear — we have everything you need to look amazing every day.
products_sub: Carefully selected to offer you the best in fashion and style.
custom_p: Have an idea in mind? We make it happen. From embroidered logos to custom prints, each garment is a work of art made for you.
step_1_p: Write to us on WhatsApp or fill out the form with your concept, colors and type of garment.
step_2_p: Our design team sends you a visual proposal within 24-48 hours for your approval.
step_3_p: Once the design is approved, we produce your garment and send it directly to your door.
ben_1_p: We only work with high quality fabrics and brands. Each garment goes through rigorous quality control before reaching you.
ben_2_p: Every custom design is exclusive. We create prints, embroideries and graphics you won't find anywhere else.
ben_3_p: Your order ships the same day of payment. Nationwide shipping with real-time tracking included.
ben_4_p: Wrong size? No problem. You have 15 days to make exchanges or returns without hassle.
reviews_sub: More than 1,800 people already trust RopaX for their fashion and custom designs.
review_1: "I ordered a shirt with my business logo and was blown away. The embroidery quality is incredible and it arrived in record time. Already placed my second order!"
review_2: "The service was incredible. They helped me choose the fabric and design, and the result exceeded all my expectations. The fit is perfect and the design looks amazing."
review_3: "I always shop here. The garments have excellent quality and the custom hoodies are insane. Everyone asks me where I get them."
contact_p: We're ready to assist you. Write to us on WhatsApp or fill out the form and we'll contact you soon.
cta_sub: Join over 1,800 people who already dress with unique style. Write to us and we'll create the perfect garment for you.
footer_tagline: Fashion that defines your style. Original clothing, custom designs and love in every piece.
msg_cart_intro: Hi RopaX! I'd like to place the following order:
msg_cart_footer: Please let me know the available payment methods.
msg_appt_intro: Hi! I'd like to request information:
wpp_float_msg: Hi! I visited the RopaX site and want more information.
about_hint: Hover to see the creative process
